title: ryanprice/agentcollective
summary: Four local LLMs running as autonomous agents on a single NVIDIA GB10 Grace Hopper with 128GB unified memory. Each agent reasons, searches the web, writes to persistent memory, and broadcasts beliefs to a shared bus. They are seeded with the same questions but develop independent epistemic positions.
